product_overview: WaadCare is a web-based system to manage the full lifecycle of medical insurance claims, provider interactions, member eligibility and a centralized medical taxonomy. It provides role-based access via JWT authentication, claim state workflows, and auditability for secure, auditable claims processing.
core_goals: Provide secure JWT-based authentication and RBAC for users.
Enable provider-driven, visit-centric claims submission with mandatory visit validation.
Offer a centralized medical taxonomy for consistent service selection and pricing driven by provider contracts.
Support claims review workflows with state transitions (draft -> submitted -> under review -> accepted/rejected).
Preserve financial immutability after claim approval and maintain a complete audit trail.
Expose member lookup and eligibility checks to enforce benefit policy and co-pay rules.

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Allow users to sign in using email and password to receive a JWT and access protected routes like the dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Input email "superadmin@tba.sa" -> Input password "Admin@123" -> Click Login button -> Receive JWT and redirect to /dashboard -> See dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Input email "wrong@tba.sa" -> Input password "wrong" -> Click Login button -> See inline error "Invalid credentials" and remain on /login

features.name: Medical Taxonomy Management
features.description: View, search and inspect the hierarchical medical categories and services used to build claims and enforce service-selection rules.
user_flows: Navigate to /medical-categories -> See list of categories -> Search for categories using keyword -> Click category from results -> See category details and linked services
Navigate to /medical-categories -> See list of categories -> Enter search that yields no results -> See "No categories found" state or message

features.name: Claims Review
features.description: List and process submitted claims, review claim details, change claim state and record reviewer actions.
user_flows: Navigate to /claims -> See list of submitted claims -> Click a claim in the list -> See claim details -> Click Approve (or Accept) -> Receive confirmation and see claim status updated to Accepted

Navigate to /claims -> See list of submitted claims -> Click a claim in the list -> See claim details -> Click Approve -> Receive validation error indicating missing visitId (visitId is MANDATORY) -> See error message and claim remains in current state

features.name: Provider Portal - Visit Registration & Claims Submission
features.description: Support provider actions to register member visits, attach services from the taxonomy, attach files, and submit visit-centric claims that enforce contract-driven pricing and taxonomy selection rules.
user_flows: Navigate to /members -> Search for member -> Select member from results -> Click Register Visit -> Input visitId and visit details -> Click Save -> See visit registered confirmation

Navigate to /claims -> Click New Claim -> Select registered visit from list -> Add services by selecting from taxonomy (no free-text) -> Attach required documents -> Click Submit -> See claim submitted and status set to Submitted
Navigate to /claims -> Click New Claim -> Attempt to submit without selecting a visit or entering visitId -> Click Submit -> See validation error "visitId is MANDATORY" and submission blocked
Navigate to /claims -> Click New Claim -> Attempt to add a service using free-text entry -> Click Add Service -> See validation error "Service must be selected from catalog"

features.name: Members & Benefit Policy Management
features.description: Lookup members, view eligibility and benefit policy summaries (co-pays, limits) to enforce coverage checks during visit registration and claim processing.
user_flows: Navigate to /members -> Search for member by name or ID -> Select member from results -> See member profile with eligibility and benefit policy summary
Navigate to /members -> Search for non-existent member -> See "Member not found" state or message

features.name: Claims Workflow, Financial Immutability & Audit Trail
features.description: Enforce claim state transitions, lock financials after approval and record an audit trail with user identity and timestamps for each action.
user_flows: Navigate to /claims -> Click a claim in the list -> See claim details and current state (e.g., Draft) -> Change state to Submitted -> See state update and audit entry recorded
Navigate to /claims -> Open an Approved claim -> Attempt to modify financial amounts -> Click Save -> See error "Financials locked after approval" and no change applied

routes.description: List of medical members (principals and dependents)
List of medical claims for review

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Secure login using email/password and JWT token
